description: CompositionPink shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, front buttoned placket, brand logo embroidered on the left side just above the hem and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cool waterDo not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry cleanTurn inside out and dry flat in shadeWarm ironarrow woman caters to fashion-oriented career women. This shirt, with its understated hue is designed with an easy silhouette. Pair it with a pencil skirt, closed toe pumps and a tonal scarf.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
